title: Brazilian Muffin Tacos
description: A rich and juicy twist on traditional Brazilian cuisine, perfect for breakfast or a snack.

ingredients.name: Muffins
ingredients.notes: Store-bought or homemade muffins work well for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Tempering Chocolate
ingredients.notes: Dark or semi-sweet chocolate works best for tempering.

ingredients.name: Large Eggs
ingredients.notes: Fresh eggs for moisture and richness.

ingredients.name: Vanilla Extract
ingredients.notes: A hint of flavor to balance the dish.

ingredients.name: Fresh Fruit
ingredients.notes: Sliced strawberries or bananas work well as a topping.

ingredients.name: Cinnamon
ingredients.notes: A pinch of warmth to balance the dish.

instructions: Preheat the comal to medium-low heat.
